user.title: Add vehicle
user.description: Enter the vehicle's license plate number, without spaces or hyphens (e.g.: B123ABC). Other details can be added later from the integration settings.

error.numar_gol: The license plate number cannot be empty.
error.format_numar_invalid: Invalid format. Enter the number without spaces, hyphens or other special characters (e.g.: B123ABC).
error.format_data_invalid: Invalid date format. Use the format DD.MM.YYYY (e.g.: 18.04.2026).
error.an_invalid: Invalid year. Enter a valid 4-digit year (check the allowed range).

error.format_data_invalid: Invalid date format. Use the format DD.MM.YYYY (e.g.: 18.04.2026).
error.an_invalid: Invalid year. Enter a valid 4-digit year (check the allowed range).
error.km_necesar: You must first configure the vehicle's current mileage (main menu → Update mileage).
error.license_key_invalid: Invalid license key. Check the format and try again.
error.license_already_used: This license key has already been used on another installation.
error.license_fingerprint_mismatch: This license key is bound to a different installation.
error.license_network_error: Cannot connect to the license server. Check your internet connection.
error.license_server_error: License server error. Please try again later.

init.title: Vehicle management
init.description: Choose the data category you want to edit.

identificare.title: Vehicle identification data
identificare.description: Fill in the identification data. All fields are optional.

administrativ.title: Administrative / tax data
administrativ.description: Enter the administrative and tax data.

leasing_data.title: Leasing expiry date
leasing_data.description: You selected the ownership type 'Leasing'. Enter the leasing contract expiry date.

revizie_ulei.title: Oil service
revizie_ulei.description: Enter the details about the last oil service and the interval until the next one.

distributie.title: Timing belt/chain
distributie.description: Enter the details about the timing belt/chain.

baterie.title: Battery
baterie.description: Enter the date of the last battery replacement.

frane.title: Brakes
frane.description: Enter the details about brake pads and discs.

data.placute_frana_km_ultimul: Brake pads – Km at last replacement
data.placute_frana_km_urmator: Brake pads – Km at next replacement
data.discuri_frana_km_ultimul: Brake discs – Km at last replacement
data.discuri_frana_km_urmator: Brake discs – Km at next replacement

trusa_prim_ajutor.title: First aid kit
trusa_prim_ajutor.description: Enter the first aid kit expiry date (mandatory in Romania).

extinctor.title: Fire extinguisher
extinctor.description: Enter the fire extinguisher expiry date (mandatory in Romania).

licenta.title: Vehicule License
licenta.description:
{license_status}

Enter your license key to activate or renew the integration.

nr_inmatriculare.name: License plate number
nr_inmatriculare.description: The vehicle's license plate number (e.g.: B123ABC).

exporta_date.name: Export vehicle data
exporta_date.description: Exports a vehicle's data to a JSON file in the Home Assistant config directory.

nr_inmatriculare.name: License plate number
nr_inmatriculare.description: The license plate number of the vehicle to export (e.g.: B123ABC).

importa_date.name: Import vehicle data
importa_date.description: Imports a vehicle's data from a JSON backup file. If the vehicle does not exist, it will be created automatically.

cale_fisier.name: File path
cale_fisier.description: Full path to the JSON backup file (e.g.: /config/vehicule_backup_b123abc.json).
